title: Mythic Moon
description: This is a new mod that WILL be uptaded and will be having uptades , bug fixes very often. It is for 1.21.11 fabric version and btw i just started making a way better version almost done expect it at march 10-14th
body:
This is a pretty epic mod which adds lycanthropy , player transformation and a very fun and challenging leveling up system! To get infected by lycanthropy you need to get attacked by a wolf , while crouching and being below 40% health when you get infected you will feel weird and feel something in your veins... After that you will become a werewolf beast almost every night except some moon phases , if the moon is showing enough the beast within you will emerge. 

When its nighttime and the moon is showing enough your human body is no longer so human... getting immense strength and many buffs which you can upgrade and even add special abilities. There are 50 unlockable levels so it feels like it almost never ends. The more you level up the harder it gets to level up again and again. To level up you have to kill plenty of prey with each level the kill requirements rising steadily. But only prey won't do the job you also need the parts of certain prey and materials. After that you have your own special GUI to level up if you have everything needed where you can also choose your fur color how awesome is that! In that GUI you can also level up , upgrade everything. Each level up grants 1 skill point and some upgrades cost 1 some 2 some special non passive cost 4! This mod is perfect for creative testing on a world because it has every command you need to not do a lot of killing and material gathering and a lot of things all the commands start with "/werewolf ..." try them out and comment if there is any command or anything you would like me to add of course it has to fit the style because this mod is under and lot of contruction and upgrading it will add much more in the next 1-2 months at most of course if it is played. The mod is perfect for a survival with friends on a server. There are a couple of keybinds which are found in the controls/keybinds scroll down and you will see to open your GUI you press H , to bite your enemy you press V , to grab you enemy press X (needs to be unlocked from GUI) , to leap press G (needs to be unlocked from GUI) , to check what you need (how many kills and what items) press K it will even have a kill track and item count track it will appear in chat. And when you bite you have a 10 second cooldown you will have a red overlay to know looks cool!       


Yo its me now i almost made a 2.0 version its almost out it will have new attacks , animation fixes , poses , and a surprise 4 legged mode while in werewolf mode hope you would like it! Gotta wait a bit i wanna make it extra good and epic.
